itinerary.title: Bangkok Arrival, Grand Palace & Wat Arun
itinerary.description: Arrive in Bangkok. Tour the Grand Palace, Wat Arun (Temple of Dawn), and experience local street markets.

itinerary.title: Bangkok to Pattaya, Sanctuary of Truth
itinerary.description: Drive to Pattaya. Visit the stunning wooden Sanctuary of Truth temple. In the evening, explore Pattaya's Walking Street.

itinerary.title: Pattaya to Chiang Mai & Cooking Class
itinerary.description: Fly to Chiang Mai. Explore the old town and join a traditional Thai cooking class in the evening.

itinerary.title: Elephant Nature Park & Jungle Trekking
itinerary.description: Visit the ethical Elephant Nature Park to interact with rescued elephants, followed by a jungle trek.

itinerary.title: Chiang Mai to Phuket / Krabi Beaches
itinerary.description: Fly to Phuket or Krabi. Check into your beach resort and relax on the white sands.

itinerary.title: Krabi/Phuket Island Hopping & Snorkeling
itinerary.description: Take a speedboat island-hopping tour. Snorkel in crystal-clear waters and relax in hidden coves.

itinerary.title: Thailand Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a free morning before transferring to the airport for your return flight.

title: Thailand: Tropical Explorer
description: Uncover the colors, culture, and coastal beauty of Thailand on an immersive Southeast Asian journey. Experience the energy of Bangkok's grand palaces and lively street food scenes, and explore the beaches, caves, and snorkeling reefs of Phuket and Krabi. Trek through the misty jungles of Chiang Mai, visit ethical elephant sanctuaries, and experience Pattaya's spectacular wooden Sanctuary of Truth and vibrant seaside entertainment.
highlights: Tour Bangkok's majestic Grand Palace and the iconic riverside Wat Arun temple
Discover Pattaya's wooden architectural masterpiece, the Sanctuary of Truth
Visit ethical elephant sanctuaries and trek the jungles of Chiang Mai
Relax on the world-famous white sand beaches of Phuket, Krabi, and Koh Samui
Speedboat island-hopping cruises with snorkeling in coral reefs
Join traditional Thai cooking classes and explore vibrant night markets
